news.title:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.

news.title:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.
news.summary:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.

news.title:
India's FY26 tractor sales rose 23% YoY to 1.05M units, driven by rural demand.
Tractor and Mechanisation Association attributes growth to improved momentum in FY26.
news.summary:
India's FY26 tractor sales rose 23% YoY to 1.05M units, driven by rural demand.
Tractor and Mechanisation Association attributes growth to improved momentum in FY26.

news.title:
West Asia conflict disrupts India's economy, hitting sectors like auto, FMCG, aviation, and pharma. Mahindra warns of production halts.
Cost spikes in crude-linked materials, freight, and raw inputs squeeze margins. Govt announces customs duty relief for key inputs.
news.summary:
West Asia conflict disrupts India's economy, hitting sectors like auto, FMCG, aviation, and pharma. Mahindra warns of production halts.
Cost spikes in crude-linked materials, freight, and raw inputs squeeze margins. Govt announces customs duty relief for key inputs.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra to raise non-electric SUV, CV prices by up to 2.5% from April 6.
The hike averages 1.6% across models; XUV700 price rise applies post first 40,000 deliveries.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra to raise non-electric SUV, CV prices by up to 2.5% from April 6.
The hike averages 1.6% across models; XUV700 price rise applies post first 40,000 deliveries.

news.title:
M&M rallies 3.2% to Rs 3,049.80 after reporting 21% YoY production growth in March 2026.
M&M's tractor sales grew 29% YoY in March 2026; FY26 saw record sales in SUVs and tractors.
news.summary:
M&M rallies 3.2% to Rs 3,049.80 after reporting 21% YoY production growth in March 2026.
M&M's tractor sales grew 29% YoY in March 2026; FY26 saw record sales in SUVs and tractors.

news.title:
M&M reported March tractor sales of 45,035 units, up 29% YoY.
Sales exceeded estimates of 37,100 units by a significant margin.
news.summary:
M&M reported March tractor sales of 45,035 units, up 29% YoY.
Sales exceeded estimates of 37,100 units by a significant margin.

news.title:
Karnataka ends EV tax exemption; introduces graded lifetime tax based on vehicle cost.
EV stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Exide, and Olectra may see focus amid policy shift.
news.summary:
Karnataka ends EV tax exemption; introduces graded lifetime tax based on vehicle cost.
EV stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Exide, and Olectra may see focus amid policy shift.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra's March vehicle sales rose 21% YoY to 99,969 units.
SUV sales contributed 60,272 units to the total March 2026 sales figure.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra's March vehicle sales rose 21% YoY to 99,969 units.
SUV sales contributed 60,272 units to the total March 2026 sales figure.

news.title:
Tata Motors PV sales expected to rise 37% YoY to 70,837 units in March 2026.
M&M SUV sales may grow 24.8% YoY; Maruti Suzuki sales estimated at 2.3 lakh units, up 19.8%.
news.summary:
Tata Motors PV sales expected to rise 37% YoY to 70,837 units in March 2026.
M&M SUV sales may grow 24.8% YoY; Maruti Suzuki sales estimated at 2.3 lakh units, up 19.8%.

news.title:
Nifty sees 'Death Cross' in March, with 12 stocks including Airtel, HCL Tech, and M&M impacted.
Airtel, HCL, and M&M show technical weakness; recovery potential depends on key resistance levels.
news.summary:
Nifty sees 'Death Cross' in March, with 12 stocks including Airtel, HCL Tech, and M&M impacted.
Airtel, HCL, and M&M show technical weakness; recovery potential depends on key resistance levels.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.
Tata Motors and Mahindra manage supply risks; MSMEs face shutdowns. Firms shift to localisation, inventory buffers, and logistical reroutes.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.
Tata Motors and Mahindra manage supply risks; MSMEs face shutdowns. Firms shift to localisation, inventory buffers, and logistical reroutes.

news.title:
Dabur, Hindalco, and M&M to announce Q4 FY26 results in May, considering dividends.
Trading windows closed for compliance; earnings to provide key market and sectoral insights.
news.summary:
Dabur, Hindalco, and M&M to announce Q4 FY26 results in May, considering dividends.
Trading windows closed for compliance; earnings to provide key market and sectoral insights.

news.title:
Mahindra warns of ₹5,000 crore annual penalty risk under CAFE III norms.
CEO Anish Shah calls proposed emission targets unrealistic given India's EV adoption stage.
news.summary:
Mahindra warns of ₹5,000 crore annual penalty risk under CAFE III norms.
CEO Anish Shah calls proposed emission targets unrealistic given India's EV adoption stage.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
India's auto sector faces potential slowdowns as West Asia conflict disrupts gas supply.
Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, and Mahindra suppliers report gas shortages, signaling supply chain issues.
news.summary:
India's auto sector faces potential slowdowns as West Asia conflict disrupts gas supply.
Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, and Mahindra suppliers report gas shortages, signaling supply chain issues.

news.title:
Tractor makers plan ₹6,000 crore capex by FY27 despite 0.2% domestic growth.
Mahindra & Mahindra shifts focus to exports, tech, and global platforms.
news.summary:
Tractor makers plan ₹6,000 crore capex by FY27 despite 0.2% domestic growth.
Mahindra & Mahindra shifts focus to exports, tech, and global platforms.

news.title:
India auto registrations in March rose 27% to 1.254M units, boosting Nifty Auto Index by 2.2%.
Tata Motors overtakes M&M in PV segment; Maruti retains 41.4% share. Ather leads E2W sales, beating Ola Electric.
news.summary:
India auto registrations in March rose 27% to 1.254M units, boosting Nifty Auto Index by 2.2%.
Tata Motors overtakes M&M in PV segment; Maruti retains 41.4% share. Ather leads E2W sales, beating Ola Electric.

news.title:
Nomura gives Mahindra & Mahindra a 'Buy' rating with a target of Rs 4662.
Strong FY26 YTD growth in PVs (19%), LCVs (17%), tractors (23%), EV EBITDA positive by FY27.
news.summary:
Nomura gives Mahindra & Mahindra a 'Buy' rating with a target of Rs 4662.
Strong FY26 YTD growth in PVs (19%), LCVs (17%), tractors (23%), EV EBITDA positive by FY27.

news.title:
Nomura rates M&M a buy with a target of ₹4,662, citing strong segment performance.
M&M's EV business is EBITDA positive with margins set to improve from PLI benefits.
news.summary:
Nomura rates M&M a buy with a target of ₹4,662, citing strong segment performance.
M&M's EV business is EBITDA positive with margins set to improve from PLI benefits.
